title: SAML 2.0 Service Provider Partner Configuration
description: Configuration for a SAML 2.0 Service Provider partner within an Identity Provider federation.

template_name.description: An identifier for the template on which to base this partner.

anonymous_user_name.description: This is a one-time name identifier that allows a user to access a service through an anonymous identity. The user name entered here is one that the service provider will recognize as a one-time name identifier for a legitimate user in the local user registry.

artifact_resolution_services.description: Partner's endpoints where artifacts are exchanged for actual SAML messages. Required if artifact binding is enabled.

encryption_settings.description: The encryption and decryption configurations for SAML messages.

force_authn_to_federate.description: A setting that specifies whether to force user to authenticate before linking the account.

include_fed_id_in_alias_partner_id.description: A setting that specifies whether to append federation ID to partner ID when mapping user aliases.

manage_name_id_services.description: Partner's endpoints that accept SAML name ID management requests or responses.

map_unknown_aliases.description: A setting that specifies whether to map non-linked persistent name ID to one-time username.

provider_id.description: A unique identifier that identifies the partner.

signature_settings.description: The signing and validation configurations for SAML messages and assertions.

single_logout_service.description: Partner's endpoints that accept SAML logout requests or responses.

single_sign_on_service.description: Partner's endpoints that accept SAML authentication requests.

soap_settings.description: A setting that specifies the connection parameters for the SOAP endpoints.

default_target_url.description: Default URL where end-user will be redirected after the completion of single sign-on.
